subject: Increase code coverage for ExecuteBuildingBlockBuilder class
commit_message:
Increase code coverage for ExecuteBuildingBlockBuilder class

Change-Id: I87ce8344f2f2329066639e6aa2d415eac06ef622
Issue-ID: SO-3538
Signed-off-by: pwielebs <piotr.wielebski@nokia.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 6 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/5412/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-master-verify-java/5412

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 258135737), max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

The code coverage was increased, what is an added value. However, this class should be refactored in future because the public method should be simplified. Also all protected modifiers in methods should be changed to private if they are not used in subclasses.

Anyway, I merge it, and refactor will be done by my team.
Change has been successfully merged by Lukasz Muszkieta

Patch Set 1:

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-merge-java/2378/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-master-merge-java/2378
